data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Extract internal/dotenv (parseDotenv, encodeDotenv, parseDotenvValue, quoteDotenvValue, validateKey). Leaf with no deps.
2. Extract internal/age (Encrypt, Decrypt - shells out to 'age' binary). Depends only on stdlib + redact helper.
3. Extract internal/store (Store type renamed from 'store', manifest types, atomicWrite, all CRUD; uses internal/age + internal/dotenv).
4. Extract internal/web (webServer renamed to Server, render method renamed to writePage, HTML template moved to template.html via go:embed).
5. Extract internal/cli (flag parsing, all runX dispatch, subcommand routing).
6. Trim cmd/thimble/main.go to <100 lines: just os.Exit, parse args, call cli.Run.
7. Move tests appropriately: store-internal tests to internal/store/store_test.go; web tests to internal/web/server_test.go; CLI integration to internal/cli/cli_test.go.

K-04 deferred renames landing here:
- (*store) Go type -> internal/store package, store.Store exported type
- webServer.render -> writePage (eliminating three-way ambiguity with runRender, store.Render)

Each commit per package. Run go build + go test after each. HTML template moves to .html file with go:embed to drop ~31 lll findings to zero.
